allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in reversed\(lines\): try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'assistant': for c in obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', []\): if c.get\('type'\) == 'text' and len\(c.get\('text',''\)\) > 200: print\(c['text'][:5000]\) break break except: pass ")
